nodes.label: Personalized lesson reports
nodes.grounding_span: found the lesson report sections were not personal enough

nodes.label: AI-generated vocabulary lists with teacher input
nodes.label_negative: AI picking random words from summary
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer giving a specific list of the vocabulary that we studied in that class to the AI

nodes.label: AI as skill enhancer for teaching
nodes.grounding_span: it has been a fantastic tool for growing my skills in applying my Chinese language knowledge

nodes.label: AI-generated activities for students
nodes.grounding_span: the AI has offered to make an activity or exercise for students, but then gives me something that isn't very coherent

nodes.label: Maintaining writing skills
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to lose my writing and communication skills

nodes.label: Student-teacher bond
nodes.grounding_span: helps to foster a stronger bond with my students

nodes.label: Teaching effectiveness
nodes.grounding_span: can be of most benefit to my students

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: deepening my understanding of English grammar, further developing my teaching skills

nodes.label: Time efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: saves me a huge amount of time

nodes.label: Satisfaction with refined vocabulary list system
nodes.grounding_span: the AI does a great job of it!

nodes.label: Frustration with AI activity generation
nodes.grounding_span: I've felt a bit frustrated at times when the AI has offered to make an activity or exercise for students, but then gives me something that isn't very coherent

nodes.label: Satisfaction with successful AI activity
nodes.grounding_span: It did manage to make a pretty successful activity for my today though! I was satisfied by that!

nodes.label: Concern about losing writing skills
nodes.grounding_span: I started to feel like I was forgetting how to write those paragraphs for myself!

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: I envision that my relationship with AI may become even more beneficial and time saving

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through ongoing conversation
nodes.grounding_span: Over time, we refined the system together

nodes.label: Selective delegation with personal oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I just briefly check the definitions and Chinese translations are correct before adding it into the report and completing the other parts myself
